name: Simulations Plus, Inc.
summary: Simulations Plus, Inc. (SLP) is a California corporation. Based on this excerpt alone, which is an SEC certification (Exhibit 31.1) rather than the Item 1 Business Description, no specific products or services are described. The filing confirms Shawn OConnor serves as Chief Executive Officer and Principal Executive Officer, and the company maintains disclosure controls and internal controls over financial reporting as required by the Sarbanes-Oxley Act.
